step_rationale: Monocyte-derived microparticles; carry tissue factor and promote inflammatory and thrombotic cascades.
mechanism: CD14+ microparticles released from activated monocytes carry tissue factor and propagate inflammation and coagulation.

references.title: Microparticles during long-term follow-up after acute myocardial infarction. Association to atherosclerotic burden and risk of cardiovascular events.
